title: Seeing an Antenna in a Dream: Intuition and News
seoDescription: What does it mean to see an antenna in a dream? Receiving news, intuition, communication, opening up to the outside world, and sensitivity.
introduction: An antenna is the tip of perception. Seeing an antenna in a dream symbolizes **'The Desire to Receive News, the Power of Intuition, and Communication with the Outside World'**. It is an effort to catch unseen signals. The height of the antenna determines the breadth of vision.
symbolism:
The condition of the antenna:

**Adjusting the Antenna:** Symbolizes trying to clarify, finding the right frequency, and effort.

**Broken Antenna:** Indicates communication breakdown, being uninformed, and loneliness.

**Roof Antenna:** Signifies family matters and news that will come into the household.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** The antenna reflects the desire for the potential in the subconscious to emerge, symbolizing new beginnings and intuitive discoveries. The New Moon offers opportunities to nurture your imagination and better perceive signals from the outside world.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** This phase overlaps with adjusting the antenna; it marks a period when you are striving to find the right frequency. It is time to take action to enhance your communication and intuitive abilities, which strengthens your personal and social connections.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon represents a moment when the height of the antenna increases and vision expands. With the illumination of your inner intuitions, significant news and events in your life emerge, guiding you towards a deeper understanding.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** In this phase, along with the symbolism of the broken antenna, it is time to leave behind communication breakdowns and feelings of loneliness. By renewing yourself, you can enter a process of breaking free from past ties and seeking healthier communication paths.
commonScenarios: Satellite antenna: Symbolizes global news or a broad vision.
Radio antenna: Represents nostalgic news or sound.
Falling antenna: Indicates that the expected news will not arrive.
cta: The dream of an antenna is news. Download the Dream Boat app to catch the signal.
